Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Enhance daily-focus skill with Gemini AI and streamline structure

- Add Gemini API integration for scope analysis with task advice
  - Primary: Gemini 2.0 Flash for time estimation + actionable advice
  - Fallback: OpenAI → Anthropic → heuristics
  - New advice field provides specific guidance for efficient task completion
- Remove unnecessary documentation files per skill-creator guidelines
  - Delete README.md, design docs, and interview notes
  - Keep only essential files for AI agent usage
- Consolidate references structure
  - Merge lark-token-stability.md into lark-setup.md
  - Improve token management documentation
- Update SKILL.md to reflect new Gemini integration and advice feature
- Repackage skill with validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
